payload.message: Refactor the payment webhook handler to verify provider signatures before parsing the body.

content.text: Moved signature verification into verifyWebhookSignature() and called it first in handlePaymentWebhook, before any body parsing. Requests with a missing or invalid signature now return 401 without touching the parser. Added unit tests for valid, missing, and tampered signatures — all pass.

payload.last_agent_message: Signature verification now runs before body parsing; tests added and passing.
